channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Scottie Scheffler withdraws from another tournament, hopes to play at Pebble Beach
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Scottie Scheffler withdrew from The American Express on Monday, saying his right hand has not fully recovered from minor surgery to repair a glass puncture over Christmas. Scheffler, the world's No.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Suns' Beal stars as a reserve in win over 76ers and makes it clear he believes he is an NBA starter
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (AP) — Bradley Beal made the most of the unfamiliar role of substitute for the Phoenix Suns. That doesn't mean he had to like it.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Chargers plan to sign Ezekiel Elliott to practice squad after his release by Cowboys
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles Chargers are planning to sign running back Ezekiel Elliott to their practice squad pending a physical, two people familiar with the situation told The Associated Press on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Antetokounmpo needs 3 stitches in finger and returns to post a triple-double in win over Raptors
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Milwaukee Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo needed three stitches to close a cut near the base of his right pinkie against Toronto on Monday night, and returned to the game to finish his fourth triple-double of the season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: North Dakota State wins 10th FCS title as Miller accounts for 4 TDs in 35-32 win over Montana State
item.description: Cam Miller ran for two touchdowns and threw for two more to lead North Dakota State to its record 10th Football Championship Subdivision title.
item.dc:creator: Stephen Hawkins, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Sheel Seidler, wife of late Padres owner, sues in-laws for control of the team
item.description: The wife of late San Diego Padres owner Peter Seidler, Sheel Seidler, sued brothers-in-law Matthew and Robert on Monday, attempting to prevent another brother, John, from taking control of the team rather than her.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Zuckerberg taps UFC President Dana White for Meta's board of directors
item.description: (KRON) -- Meta founder and CEO Mark Zuckerberg rings in the new year with several major personnel announcements. Three high-profile individuals have been named to join Meta's board of directors, including one of the most prominent figures in sports.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: Tough, old school defense a calling card for all four teams left in the national championship hunt
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — The expanded College Football Playoff has a decidedly old-school feel: Smothering defenses have carried the last four teams still in the hunt for the national championship. If you want offense, look elsewhere this weekend.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: WWE announces location of 2026 Royal Rumble
item.description: WWE announced on Monday the Royal Rumble will take place outside of North America for the first time when Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, plays host in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dolphins' frustrated Tyreek Hill appears to indicate he wants out of Miami after loss to Jets
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — A frustrated Tyreek Hill might want out of Miami. The star wide receiver appeared to indicate after the Dolphins' 32-20 loss to the New York Jets on Sunday that he could want to play elsewhere next season.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Big Ten, SEC each have 4 top 10 teams in AP women's poll as UCLA, South Carolina still lead way
item.description: The Big Ten and Southeastern Conference each has seven teams ranked in the AP top 25 women’s basketball poll, including four apiece in the first 10.
item.dc:creator: Doug Feinberg, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers secure playoff win: Fans celebrate victory
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (WFLA) — With the Bucs clinching a playoff spot, fans are fired up as they look ahead to the next steps in their postseason journey. It was a rough start for fans cheering on the Tampa Bay Buccaneers against the New Orleans Saints on the opening drives.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Colts owner Jim Irsay says he's retaining GM Chris Ballard and coach Shane Steichen
item.description: About four hours after the Colts completed their season with a 26-23 overtime victory over the Jacksonville Jaguars, Irsay ended any speculation about possible offseason changes by announcing in a letter to fans that longtime general manager Chris Ballard and second-year coach Shane Steichen would r
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bo Nix throws 4 touchdown passes as Broncos earn AFC's final playoff spot in rout of Chiefs
item.description: With the Kansas City Chiefs sitting most of their starters, Bo Nix and the Denver Broncos demolished their AFC West rival to take the final playoff spot in their conference.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Baker Mayfield leads Bucs to 4th quarter comeback over Saints to win NFC South title
item.description: Baker Mayfield delivered a clutch fourth quarter to help the Tampa Bay Buccaneers beat the New Orleans Saints, which gives them the NFC South title.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fox Sports captures Saints' moment of silence in first game after deadly terror attack
item.description: Fox Sports captured the somber moment when the Tampa Bay Buccaneers and New Orleans Saints had a moment of silence for those killed in the terror attack on New Year's Day.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utah HC falls in overtime to Dallas, 3-2
item.description: DALLAS (AP) - Thomas Harley scored 3:01 into overtime to give the Dallas Stars their fourth straight win, 3-2 against the Utah Hockey Club at American Airlines Center on Saturday. Matt Duchene found Harley near the right post after collecting his own rebound in front of the net.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU gets trounced by #14 Houston 86-55
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team came into the Big 12 season thinking it could compete with the top teams in one of the toughest leagues in the nation. But if Saturday was any indication, the Cougars have a long way to go.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Knicks visit conference foe Chicago Saturday
item.description: New York Knicks (24-11, third in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (15-19, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Saturday, 8 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Knicks -5.5; over/under is 235.5 BOTTOM LINE: Chicago takes on New York in Eastern Conference action Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: LeBron James breaks Michael Jordan's record for 30-point games with his 563rd
item.description: LeBron James broke Michael Jordan's NBA record for 30-point games during the Los Angeles Lakers' victory over Atlanta on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: BBB provides tips on buying Detroit Lions tickets, avoiding scams
item.description: The Better Business Bureau of West Michigan is providing some tips if you’re looking to buy tickets to the Detroit Lions game on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: Meghan Bunchman, NewsNation

item.title: CMU Women's wrestling thrives under Coach Mercado's leadership
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Colorado Mesa University women’s wrestling coach Travis Mercado expressed gratitude for his team’s commitment and drive to succeed. “I’m just grateful to have a group of young ladies that I trust and who trust me,” Mercado said.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Baker Mayfield's success in Tampa Bay has turned him into a coach-builder
item.description: Baker Mayfield revived his career in Tampa Bay and became a coach-builder in the process. Mayfield’s success with the Buccaneers in 2023 helped Dave Canales become head coach of the Carolina Panthers after just one season as an offensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, WFLA, NBC

item.title: UIC men's basketball team scores huge win by knocking mid-major power Drake from ranks of unbeaten
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Drake men's basketball team walked into Credit Union 1 Arena on Chicago's Near West Side on New Year's Day with no losses this season. They exited with one, courtesy of the University of Illinois Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: With chance for 3rd straight win, Bulls fall on road to woeful Wizards, 125-107
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After winning two games in a row to close out 2024, the Bulls seemingly had a great opportunity to kick off 2025 with a third straight victory when they visited the nation's capital on Wednesday night to face the woeful Wizards. Things certainly didn't go as planned for Chicago.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Blues have all the fun in convincing victory over the Blackhawks in the Winter Classic
item.description: The Winter Classic returned to Wrigley on the final day of 2024, and the Chicago Blackhawks threw quite a party but ended up on the losing end.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Utah's road winning streak ends in Seattle
item.description: SEATTLE (AP) - Jaden Schwartz had a goal and two assists for the Seattle Kraken, who pulled away in the third period for a 5-2 win against the Utah Hockey Club at Climate Pledge Arena on Monday. The loss ends Utah's seven-game road winning streak. “[Points] never come easy,” Schwartz said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Montgomery 75, Windward 74
item.description: KUSI (SAN DIEGO)-Montgomery playing in the fifth place game on Monday afternoon went to overtime for bonus basketball against Windward and won 75-74. Lead by Senior, JJ Sanchez who poured in 27. While fellow senior Devin Hamilton added 18, and Alek Sanchez, twin of JJ hit for 12.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5
